title: CBB Rulebook Volume 6 Crypto-Asset Platform Operators Module
summary: Required licensing for crypto-asset platform operators carrying on activities within or from Bahrain and covered client safeguards, accepted crypto-assets, technology standards, cyber security, cryptographic keys, wallet storage, AML, custody, reporting, notifications, approvals and CBB inspection powers.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Early CBB module for crypto-asset platform operators.
theme_notes.digital_finance.virtual_assets: Early CBB framework for crypto-asset platform operators.

notes: Related instruments: Superseded by the broader Crypto-Asset Module
